cells: **statement**
**negative**
**question**
cells_uz: **darak gap**
**inkor gap**
**so'roq gap**
cells_ru: **утверждение**
**отрицание**
**вопрос**

cells: _You **should have told** me you were going shopping._
_You **shouldn't (should not) have told** Liz what Bill said._
_**Should** I **have invited** Carol to the party?_
cells_uz: _You **should have told** me you were going shopping._
_You **shouldn't (should not) have told** Liz what Bill said._
_**Should** I **have invited** Carol to the party?_
cells_ru: _You **should have told** me you were going shopping._
_You **shouldn't (should not) have told** Liz what Bill said._
_**Should** I **have invited** Carol to the party?_

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation: Ba'zi fe'llarning noto'g'ri o'tgan zamon sifatdoshi shakllari mavjud. 182-sahifaga qarang.
tip.translation_ru: Некоторые глаголы имеют неправильные формы причастий прошедшего времени. См. стр. 182.

cells: To say that someone had the opportunity or ability to do something, but didn't do it
could
_We **could have gone** to the party, but we decided not to in the end._
cells_uz: Kimdir biror narsa qilish imkoniyati yoki qobiliyatiga ega bo'lganini, lekin buni qilmaganini bildirish uchun
could
_We **could have gone** to the party, but we decided not to in the end._
cells_ru: Сказать, что у кого-то была возможность или способность сделать что-то, но он этого не сделал
could
_We **could have gone** to the party, but we decided not to in the end._

tip.label: Watch out!
tip.translation:
Buni o'tmishdagi umumiy qobiliyat uchun ishlatmaymiz. O'tmishdagi umumiy qobiliyat uchun could + bare infinitive ishlatamiz (22-darsga qarang).
✓ _I **could play** the guitar when I was seven._ ( = Men yetti yoshimda gitara chalishni bilardim.)
✓ _I **could have played** the guitar._ ( = Menda gitara chalish imkoniyati bor edi, lekin men uni aslida chalmaganman.)
tip.translation_ru:
Мы не используем это для общей способности в прошлом. Для общей способности в прошлом используем could + bare infinitive (см. Unit 19).
✓ _I **could play** the guitar when I was seven._ ( = В семь лет я умел играть на гитаре.)
✓ _I **could have played** the guitar._ ( = У меня была возможность сыграть на гитаре, но я на самом деле не играл.)

cells: To say that someone's past behaviour was bad or wrong
ought to / should

_You **should have invited** Carol to your party.
( = You didn't invite Carol and that was wrong.)_
cells_uz: Kimdir o'tmishda noto'g'ri yoki yomon harakat qilganini bildirish uchun
ought to / should

_You **should have invited** Carol to your party.
( = Siz Carolni taklif qilmadingiz va bu noto'g'ri edi.)_
cells_ru: Сказать, что чьё-то прошлое поведение было плохим или неправильным
ought to / should

_You **should have invited** Carol to your party.
( = Вы не пригласили Кэрол, и это было неправильно.)_

cells: Strong probability
must / can't

_They **must have had** a lovely holiday!
( = It's almost certain that they had a lovely holiday.)
They **can't have had** any sleep!
( = It's almost certain that they didn't have any sleep.)_
cells_uz: Kuchli ehtimol
must / can't

_They **must have had** a lovely holiday!
( = Ular ajoyib dam olganiga deyarli ishonch bor.)
They **can't have had** any sleep!
( = Ular umuman uxlamaganiga deyarli ishonch bor.)_
cells_ru: Высокая вероятность
must / can't

_They **must have had** a lovely holiday!
( = Почти наверняка, у них был чудесный отпуск.)
They **can't have had** any sleep!
( = Почти наверняка, они совсем не спали.)_

cells: Possibility
could / may / might

_Helen **might have found** a new house.
( = It's possible, but I'm not certain.)_
cells_uz: Ehtimollik
could / may / might

_Helen **might have found** a new house.
( = Bu mumkin, lekin men aniq bilmayman.)_
cells_ru: Возможность
could / may / might

_Helen **might have found** a new house.
( = Это возможно, но я не уверен.)_

cells: To show you expected the past to be different from what actually happened
ought to / should
_Jim **should have arrived** half an hour ago. I wonder where he is._
cells_uz: O'tmishda kutilgandan farqli narsa sodir bo'lganini bildirish uchun
ought to / should
_Jim **should have arrived** half an hour ago. I wonder where he is._
cells_ru: Показать, что вы ожидали, что прошлое будет отличаться от того, что произошло на самом деле
ought to / should
_Jim **should have arrived** half an hour ago. I wonder where he is._
